mission.title: sops: Problem using sops with passphrase-protected age key file
mission.description: Problem using sops with passphrase-protected age key file. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current sops setup
steps.description:
Verify your sops version and configuration:
```bash
sops --version
```
This feature requires a working sops installation.

steps.title: Review sops configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant sops configuration:
Hey there,

I am currently trying out sops with the freshly released version 1.0.0 of age.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Problem using sops with passphrase-protected age key file
steps.description:
For me this isn't working anymore since sops `3.8.0`. Regardless if the `SOPS_AGE_KEY` env var is exported or put directly in front of the binary.

```
Failed to get the data key required to decrypt the SOPS file.

Group 0: FAILED
  age1w8egqmyze2hrf2vcyjkxylny9qg8nw8rp9ux9kl9y95rrruthdmqxlzwpp:
```yaml
# decrypt to an ephemeral file (will be asked to enter the passphrase)
age -d -o /run/shm/keys.txt ~/.config/sops/age/keys

# schedule the file deletion in 1 hour from now
systemd-run --user -u age-clean --on-calendar "@<epoch timestamp from date -d "+1hour" +%s>" rm /run/shm/keys.txt
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Problem using sops with passphrase-protected age key file" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
For me this isn't working anymore since sops `3.8.0`. Regardless if the `SOPS_AGE_KEY` env var is exported or put directly in front of the binary.

```
Failed to get the data key required to decrypt the SOPS file.
codeSnippets:
# decrypt to an ephemeral file (will be asked to enter the passphrase)
age -d -o /run/shm/keys.txt ~/.config/sops/age/keys

# schedule the file deletion in 1 hour from now
systemd-run --user -u age-clean --on-calendar "@<epoch timestamp from date -d "+1hour" +%s>" rm /run/shm/keys.txt

prerequisites.description: A working sops installation or development environment.
